section.title: Expectations
section.p: Students in this course are expected to come to class for every scheduled meeting, with the understanding that things come up that will keep you away. Stay in contact with me if you have to miss a class.

Students in this course are expected to watch the video lessons and read the textbook sections before coming to class. This is described in . The course calendar in lays out which sections are covered on which days.

You are also expected to check your pcc.edu email daily. I sometimes send important information in mass emails to the class. It is your responsibility to read these messages as they come. Also I may be replying to a message that you initiated, and I am only permitted to contact you using your pcc.edu email address.

If you have a scehduling conflict with one of our exams, then you have the responsibility to make another arrangements according to . These arrangements need to be in place typically at least one week ahead of the exam.

Reach out to me or a tutor early when you are having trouble with a topic. Your responsibility is to recognize when you need this help. We can make a plan to help you if we have enough time. We might meet over Zoom or in person, whatever we need to do.
